---
title: "CMS Fast Facts"
subtitle: "April 2025 Release"
logo: assets/CMS_logo.jpeg
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme:
      - cosmo
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: github
        href: "#"
        aria-label: "Source Code"
    scrolling: false
resources:
  - assets/CMS_logo.jpeg
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
#| label: dependencies
#| include: false

#dependencies
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(scales)

```

```{r}
#| label: load_data
#| include: false

#load each the data needed for each tab, stored in a list element
context <- read_rds("Dataout/context.rds")

```

# Context {data-icon="house-fill"}

## Row

```{r}
#| label: ban_nhe
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "National Health Expenditures"
#| icon: heart-pulse-fill
#| color: primary

list(
  value = scales::label_number(
    prefix   = "$",
    suffix   = "T",
    accuracy = 0.1,
    big.mark = ","
  )(context$bans[["nhe_total"]]/1e3),
  subtitle = context$years[["nhe_yr"]]
)
```

```{r}
#| label: share-gdp
#| title: "...share of GDP"

ggplot() +
  geom_rect(
    aes(
      xmin = 0,
      xmax = 12,
      ymin = 0,
      ymax = 100 / 12
    ),
    color = "#505050",
    fill = "white"
  ) +
  geom_rect(
    aes(
      xmin = 0,
      xmax = sqrt(context[["nhe_gdp_share"]]*100),
      ymin = 0,
      ymax = sqrt(context[["nhe_gdp_share"]]*100)
    )
  ) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void()


```

```{r}
#| label: per_capita
#| title: "...per capita"

"x"

```

## Row
```{r}
#| label: ban_health-insurance
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Health Insurance"
#| icon: heart-pulse-fill
#| color: primary

list(
  value = scales::label_number(
    prefix   = "$",
    suffix   = "T",
    accuracy = 0.1,
    big.mark = ","
  )(context$bans[["health_insurance"]]/1e3),
  subtitle = context$years[["nhe_yr"]]
)
```

```{r}
#| label: insurance

context[["df_insurance"]] |>
  ggplot(aes(share, "x", fill = fct_reorder(category, share))) +
  geom_col(color = "white") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.y = element_blank()) +
  theme(legend.position = "blank")
```

## Row
```{r}
#| label: ban_fed_spend
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "CMS Federal Program Spending"
#| icon: heart-pulse-fill
#| color: primary

list(
  value = scales::label_number(
    prefix   = "$",
    suffix   = "T",
    accuracy = 0.1,
    big.mark = ","
  )(context$bans[["fed_spend"]]/1e6),
  subtitle = context$years[["fed_spend_yr"]]
)
```
